### 4.7 Marketability
Score: **1 / 3**  
Evidence Type: **E2_indirect_or_class_level_evidence**  
Main line: A. TAP 810,000명, B. Unrisked Peak Sales 1,458 million USD, C. Obtainable Peak Sales 981 million USD로 산정되어 1점이다.

What was checked:
- Targetable addressable patient
- Unrisked peak sales
- Competition haircut
- Pricing power adjustment
- Expansion capacity adjustment

Worksheet:

| Step | What to fill | Evidence / assumption |
|---|---|---|
| A. TAP | US adult epilepsy pool 3,000,000 x diagnosis rate 90% x focal-onset eligibility 60% x uncontrolled/treatable subgroup 50% = **810,000 patients** | US adult epilepsy and uncontrolled FOS anchored to Xenon market statement; focal seizure share supported by epidemiology sources. Diagnosis rate is analyst assumption and needs claims-data confirmation [20], [28], [30], [31] |
| B. Unrisked Peak Sales | 810,000 x annual net price USD 9,000 x peak penetration 20% x duration factor 1.0 = **1,458 million USD** | Annual net price modeled from branded ASM/XCOPRI price and analyst net-price references. Penetration assumes likely 3rd/4th same-target entrant ex-China [20], [32], [33] |
| Entry-order matrix | 3-player example: 1st ~50%, 2nd ~30%, 3rd ~20%. NS-041 base model uses 20% pre-haircut penetration | Same-target leaders: Xenon, Biohaven, historical retigabine class; China may differ due Livzon rights [20], [21], [27] |
| C. Obtainable Peak Sales | 1,458 x competition haircut 0.65 x pricing power adjustment 0.90 x expansion capacity adjustment 1.15 = **981 million USD** | Competition haircut from same-target front-runners; pricing haircut from generic ASM/branded payer pressure; expansion uplift from MDD/pain/China optionality but not fully counted [4], [11], [20], [21], [34] |
| Final score basis | Obtainable Peak Sales < USD 1,000M, so **1점** | Near-threshold but not enough for 2점 under rubric |

Investigation note:
- Marketability is based on obtainable peak sales, not rNPV.
- Base model is intentionally FOS-focused and conservative.
- MDD/pain/global expansion could create upside, but efficacy/pricing assumptions are too speculative to fully count.

Why not higher:
- C. Obtainable Peak Sales가 981 million USD로 USD 1,000M 기준을 소폭 하회한다.
- Xenon/Biohaven same-target front-runner와 NS-041 환자 효능 데이터 부재로 competition haircut을 완화하기 어렵다.

Uncertain points:
- China-specific obtainable value는 Livzon rights 때문에 SKBP 관점에서 별도 권리 확인 필요.
- MDD/pain expansion은 human efficacy data 확인 전까지 marketability에 제한적으로만 반영했다.
- Annual net price는 US branded ASM benchmark 기반 assumption이며, payer/rebate data 확인 필요.

Source URLs:
- [4], [11], [20], [21], [28], [30], [31], [32], [33], [34]

## 6) Final Take

One-line summary:  
**NS-041은 SKBP E/I Balance–Ion Channel 관점에서 biology fit이 강한 clinical-stage Kv7/KCNQ2/3 opener이나, same-target front-runner와 권리·데이터 불확실성 때문에 즉시 Shortlist보다는 Watch/Review가 적절하다.**

Recommendation:
- **Watch**

Most important diligence question:
- **Ex-Greater China 권리 확보 가능성과 NS-041의 Phase I safety/PK 및 Phase II patient efficacy/ophthalmic safety 원자료가 azetukalner/BHV-7000 대비 실질적 차별화를 입증하는가?**

platform_attractiveness.why_not_higher: 동일 platform에서 반복적으로 임상 진입한 다수 asset 또는 외부 검증된 discovery 성과가 충분히 공개되지 않아 3점은 부적절하다.
uncertain_points: NeuShen의 small-molecule platform hit rate, cycle time, proprietary screening/chemistry 차별화 원자료 필요.

expansion_potential.evidence_type_reason: NS-041 자체가 FOS, MDD, pain으로 공식 pipeline에 표기되고 depression 임상 승인 및 preclinical depression rationale이 공개되어 있다.
expansion_potential.main_line_summary: Epilepsy 외 MDD와 pain까지 이어질 수 있는 same-biology expansion potential이 크다.
evidence_trail: NeuShen pipeline은 NS-041 indication을 FOS, MDD, pain으로 표기한다.
HKEX/Livzon 공시는 depression clinical trial approval과 depression mouse model efficacy를 언급한다.
KCNQ2/3 activation은 seizure와 mood disorder 양쪽에서 neuronal excitability modulation rationale을 가진다.
expansion_potential.investigation_note: Adjacent indication은 단순한 seizure wording variation이 아니라 MDD/pain 확장이다.
expansion_potential.why_not_higher: 최대점인 3점이다. 단, expansion의 상업적 가치는 MDD/pain 효능 데이터 확인 전까지 제한적으로 반영한다.
uncertain_points: Pain indication의 정확한 stage와 indication subtype은 공개 pipeline 외 상세 근거가 부족하다.

data_maturity.evidence_type_reason: NS-041의 Phase I SAD/MAD 안전성/PK 완료 및 Phase II FOS/MDD clinical status가 공개되어 있다.
data_maturity.main_line_summary: 임상 진입과 Phase II 진행은 확인되지만 환자 효능 데이터와 full clinical package는 아직 공개되지 않았다.
evidence_trail: 회사 poster는 MES/PTZ/6Hz seizure models, ADME/PK, repeat-dose toxicity 및 safety window를 언급한다.
Livzon은 Phase I SAD/MAD safety/tolerability/PK completion을 발표했다.
NeuShen pipeline은 FOS Phase II recruiting, MDD Phase II initializing으로 표기한다.
data_maturity.investigation_note: Preclinical package와 Phase I/Phase II status가 있어 2점은 가능하다.
data_maturity.why_not_higher: 환자 대상 efficacy 결과가 없고 Phase I 결과도 press release 수준이라 3점으로 올리지 않았다.
data_maturity.claimed_development_stage: Phase II focal onset seizure recruiting; MDD Phase II initializing/approved in China; Phase I SAD/MAD completed by Livzon source
expected_data_for_stage: 12-week Phase II FOS efficacy and safety
visible_asset_specific_data: preclinical seizure models
company poster ADME/PK and safety-window statement
Phase I completion press release
official Phase II status
missing_data: peer-reviewed NS-041 paper
full Phase I CSR
patient efficacy data
quantitative selectivity/safety panel
detailed ocular safety package
data_maturity.stage_data_alignment_judgment: Stage is consistent with early clinical Phase II, but public evidence is less mature than ideal for BD diligence.
uncertain_points: China Drug Trials registry details should be directly exported/verified because automated parsing is limited.

marketability.evidence_type_reason: Market calculation uses epidemiology, FOS proportion, uncontrolled-patient assumptions, XCOPRI price references, and competitor positioning rather than NS-041 revenue data.
marketability.main_line_summary: A. TAP 810,000명, B. Unrisked Peak Sales 1,458 million USD, C. Obtainable Peak Sales 981 million USD로 산정되어 1점이다.

A_targetable_addressable_patient.formula: TAP = Total Patient Pool x Diagnosis Rate x Eligibility Rate x Treatable Subgroup Rate

entry_order_share_assumption.expected_entry_order: Likely 3rd/4th same-target entrant ex-China; China may differ due Livzon rights
entry_order_share_assumption.matrix_share_reference: 3-player example: 1st ~50%, 2nd ~30%, 3rd ~20%; model uses 20% peak penetration before haircut.

B_unrisked_peak_sales.formula: Unrisked Peak Sales = TAP x Annual Net Price x Peak Penetration x Treatment Duration Factor; output in million USD

C_obtainable_peak_sales.formula: Obtainable Peak Sales = Unrisked Peak Sales x Competition Haircut x Pricing Power Adjustment x Expansion Capacity Adjustment; output in million USD

evidence_trail: US adult epilepsy pool is anchored at approximately 3 million adults; focal onset share modeled at 60%; uncontrolled subgroup at 50%.
Annual net price modeled at 9,000 USD per patient-year.
Competition haircut reflects azetukalner/opakalim front-runners and broad ASM competition.
marketability.investigation_note: Marketability is based on obtainable peak sales, not rNPV. Obtainable sales is below USD 1,000M threshold after haircuts.
marketability.why_not_higher: C. Obtainable Peak Sales가 981 million USD로 1,000 million USD 기준을 소폭 하회하고 same-target front-runner 및 clinical efficacy uncertainty가 있어 2점으로 올리지 않았다.
uncertain_points: Global/China/MDD/pain expansion을 포함하면 upside가 커질 수 있으나 현재는 efficacy/pricing assumptions가 speculative하다.

similarity_summary.summary: High-similarity same-target competitors include azetukalner/XEN1101, opakalim/BHV-7000, and historical retigabine/ezogabine. QRL-101 and SAN2355 are medium similarity future same-target assets. PRAX-628 and cenobamate are lower similarity FOS competitors with different MoA.

competitor_table.stage: Phase 3 FOS positive topline; NDA planned; Phase 3 MDD/BPD
competitor_table.why_it_matters: Most important same-target front-runner; defines efficacy/safety benchmark.

competitor_table.stage: Late-stage/Phase 2/3 epilepsy; MDD POC did not meet primary endpoint
competitor_table.why_it_matters: Second same-target late-stage competitor; tolerability claims may pressure NS-041 differentiation.

competitor_table.stage: Previously approved adjunctive partial-onset seizure therapy; discontinued
competitor_table.why_it_matters: Clinically validates class but highlights retinal/pigmentation and commercial/safety diligence risks.

competitor_table.stage: Phase 1 proof-of-mechanism / ALS and epilepsy biomarker expansion
competitor_table.why_it_matters: Same target with ALS/biomarker-first positioning; future epilepsy adjacency competitor.

competitor_table.stage: Preclinical / GLP tox-enabling; worldwide rights licensed to Jazz
competitor_table.why_it_matters: Future pharma-backed same-target competitor; shows BD interest in Kv7.2/7.3 activation.

competitor_table.stage: Phase 2/3 FOS studies expected/ongoing
competitor_table.why_it_matters: Same FOS disease competitor with different ion-channel MoA.

competitor_table.target_or_moa: Persistent sodium current inhibition and GABA-A PAM
competitor_table.stage: Approved adult focal/partial-onset seizure therapy
competitor_table.why_it_matters: Current branded standard and relevant price/commercial benchmark; MoA differs.

cross_checked_facts.fact: NS-041 is a KCNQ2/3 activator
NS-041 is in Phase II/clinical development for FOS and depression
Livzon has exclusive Greater China rights
KCNQ/Kv7 opener class has clinical validation and historical safety diligence needs

uncertain_points: NeuShen Therapeutics와 NeurAxon Pharmaceuticals (Shanghai)의 정확한 법적 관계 및 IP ownership chain 확인 필요
NS-041 Phase I full CSR, SAD/MAD dose levels, AE table, PK exposure, food/DDI data 원자료 필요
NS-041 환자 대상 Phase II efficacy data는 아직 공개 확인되지 않음
Pain indication의 stage/subtype/development priority 불명확
Ex-Greater China rights availability and encumbrances should be verified from the 2024 license agreement

source_registry.source_title: SK Life Science XCOPRI WAC disclosure

final_insight.one_line_summary: NS-041은 SKBP E/I Balance–Ion Channel 관점에서 biology fit이 강한 임상단계 Kv7/KCNQ2/3 opener이나, same-target front-runner와 권리/데이터 불확실성 때문에 Watch/Review가 적절하다.
final_insight.most_important_diligence_question: Ex-Greater China 권리 확보 가능성과 NS-041의 Phase I safety/PK 및 Phase II patient efficacy/ophthalmic safety 원자료가 azetukalner/BHV-7000 대비 실질적 차별화를 입증하는가?
